Mixed martial arts events
2002 in Shooto
Information
First dateJanuary 12, 2002
Last dateDecember 14, 2002
Events
Total events21
Fights
Total fights146
Title fights4
Chronology
2001 in Shooto 2002 in Shooto 2003 in Shooto

The year 2002 is the 14th year in the history of Shooto, a mixed martial arts promotion based in Japan. In 2002 Shooto held 21 events beginning with, Shooto: Treasure Hunt 1.

Title fights

[edit]
Title fights in 2002
Weight class Method Round Time Event Notes
Middleweight Masanori Suda def. Lance Gibson Decision (Unanimous) 3 5:00 Shooto: Treasure Hunt 1 [a]
Bantamweight Masahiro Oishi (c) vs. Hisao Ikeda Draw 3 5:00 Shooto: Treasure Hunt 10 [b]
Lightweight Takanori Gomi def. Dokonjonosuke Mishima TKO (Punches) 2 0:52 Shooto: Year End Show 2002 [c]
Featherweight Alexandre Franca Nogueira (c) def. Hiroyuki Abe Submission (Rear-Naked Choke) 1 3:53 Shooto: Year End Show 2002 [d]
  1. ^ For the Middleweight Champion.
  2. ^ For the Bantamweight Champion.
  3. ^ For the Lightweight Champion.
  4. ^ For the Featherweight Champion.

[edit]
